code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      else
        if has_digit
          let v = if neg
            -current
          else
            current
          end
          result = list.push(result, v)
          current = 0
          has_digit = false
          neg = false
        end
        if b == 45
          neg = true
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    let v = if neg
      -current
    else
      current
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn add_unique(_ acc: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in sorted
      if not inserted and x < y
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let empty: List<Int> = []
let merged = add_unique(add_unique(empty, a), b)
let sorted = sort_asc(merged)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
